details.heading: Your transaction is secure
details.content: We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more

about_item: SECURE DOUBLE DOOR DESIGN: Internet's Best Wire Dog Crate features front and side doors with two-side bolt latches for secure closure, creating a safe and den-like space your small dog, cat, or puppy will adore, providing comfort and security at home.

LEAK-PROOF PLASTIC PAN: Each Internet's Best crate includes a removable leak-proof plastic pan for easy cleaning. This design prevents mess and odors, ensuring a hygienic environment for your pet, making maintenance hassle-free and convenient.

IDEAL FOR SMALL DOGS: Designed for small dog breeds weighing 11 to 25 pounds, the Internet's Best crate measures 17" Width x 24" Depth x 19.5" Height, providing ample space while ensuring a secure fit, creating a cozy and comfortable home environment.

COLLAPSIBLE AND PORTABLE: The Internet's Best crate collapses and folds down easily, making it perfect for home use and travel. Its space-saving design and detachable carrying handle ensure easy transportation and convenient storage.

TRAVEL-FRIENDLY DESIGN: The Internet's Best crate is perfect for road trips and vacations, thanks to its collapsible design and detachable carrying handle. It ensures your pet's comfort and security on the go, making travel hassle-free.

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate to be well-constructed, easy to assemble without tools, and appreciate its size, being perfect for two medium-sized dogs. They like its appearance, particularly the bright pink color, and consider it good value for money, noting it's half the price of a smaller kennel. The durability receives mixed feedback - while some find it sturdy, others say it's not as sturdy as previous crates. The door functionality is also mixed, with customers reporting that while the latches are secure, they find them hard to open and close.

authors_reviews.title: Good medium weight, excellent quality crate in a beautiful medium turquoise blue color.
authors_reviews.text: ❤🐕 LOVE this crate! Was in PERFECT condition when delivered, and I received it within 3 days of placing my order! SUPER fast shipping, which I was super pleased with because item delivery time was about 7 days. Upon opening the perfect packaging, this BEAUTIFUL medium turquoise blue color emerged! I was thrilled because other reviews said was more of a dark blue. (Perhaps color varies based on the crate size). I ordered the 36" crate for my 20 lb Aussie doodle/schnauzer silky terrier mix rescue pup. (7 months old). She can stand, turn, lay down completely with ample room. 1/4 of the crate is for her toys as she is not a happy camper being crate trained and has separation anxiety. This crate is PERFECT for her. The pan in the bottom is very strong, NOT AT ALL FLIMSY like most crates. The crate construction is I would say, a medium weight- definately NOT flimsy or lightweight, and not for large, more powerful breeds. This is great for small to medium dogs (always check your dogs height & length) to be sure to order the correct size. They should NOT be cramped, with room to stand, lay down fully and turn around. I am a rescue volunteer and would rather see a very comfortable pet, nice crate bed with room for toys. I will be ordering small crate bowls that can be attached to the crate side walls so not to take up any floor room. I believe this is the perfect crate to crate train my dog so she's safe if I have to leave the house. I am a stay at home mom, and crate will only be used for when I need to run out. Pets should NOT be left crated in long periods of time! She will definately have a good crate environment, be safe with her toys, very comfortable giving me peace of mind when I run out for errands. Be sure to Google "crate training" to help with your pets specific needs. (Especially if they have separation anxiety.) You want your pet to have their crate be a pleasant experience, and this crate was better than I had imagined based on other reviews.
authors_reviews.author: Dale

authors_reviews.title: Great lightweight crate. Love the blue!
authors_reviews.text: Spent forever trying to figure out which 'house' to buy to replace our old rusting heavy-duty one. The one we had was medium size, built like a tank, and weighed far more than our 11-pound dog does. It could have contained Cujo. All I wanted was a lighter weight one that had the same two-door collapsible design. Lot's of reviewers note that this one is rickety and not very strong. Compared to the one we had, I agree. But since I am using it for a little 11 pound dog, the sheer strength of it doesn't really matter. The quality isn't bad at all. And all sides came together very solidly when I unfolded it just like this style does, and the tray is held in place actually more securely than my old one.It is the perfect replacement house, and the medium fits the same bed and a water bowl with room to spare. My dog uses it as a quiet place to escape to when we're around, and I have no hesitation keeping her in it when we're out. The sliding latch closures are actually a better design than my old one too, in case you have an escape artist. I do agree with other reviewers that this wouldn't be good for a dog that weighs a lot, is hyperactive or aggressive.The blue was what attracted me to it in the first place. Photo is a little different than the color, which I was happy to see. It is a little bit more of a true or royal blue. Not turquoise or teal. I am really happy with it.
authors_reviews.author: JustARegularReader

authors_reviews.title: Perfect size for a cat
authors_reviews.text: I got this to use for stray cats that I occasionally bring inside until I can re-home them. I use it in my basement; due to my own cats upstairs who wouldn’t be happy about a stranger among them. I only use it overnight, so the cat is safe and I don’t have to worry about what it might be doing to my basement while I’m sleeping. It’s big enough inside to set up a small bed, food & water and a small litter pan. This is a good size in my opinion, I put mine on a table. It is small enough that a standard blanket fits over it, which I use to keep cat warm and allow it a safe hiding space since strays are often scared and stressed. It’s a very pretty blue color, which looks softer than the black ones. It was simple to assemble, took me only about 5 minutes, if that. I got this one because I needed one quickly. Others may cost a little less but took longer to arrive. Regardless, I’m happy with what I chose. Do recommend.
authors_reviews.author: Doreen B.

authors_reviews.title: Nice Crate!
authors_reviews.text: It's a nice crate. Really pretty color. I got the medium in blue for my puppy. She is only 11 pounds now and expected to be about 30 full grown, so she has PLENTY of room! I love that it has a side and front door. It makes it much easier to get her in and out. It's lighter than the older/smaller. metal crate I had. The front door was a little bent when I got it. I didn't want her to be able to stick her paw trough it and get stuck so I just put a little pad lock in the bottom corner to hold it closed. I'm sure I can try and bend it a little too. It wasn't a huge deal. The locks are a little difficult to open and close. I've found it easier to both push and pull them at the same time to unlock the doors. Also, not a huge deal. All in all I am very happy with my purchase.
authors_reviews.author: Dana L.

authors_reviews.title: A great kennel
authors_reviews.text: A great product, wire quality excellent, stable and great value…that after use easily folds in to save space.
authors_reviews.author: Patycakes
